---
title: "GCC Boundary Drift Class and Compensating Controls Architecture"
subtitle: "Architecture Decision Record · ADR-030 · PROPOSED"
date: 2026-04-19
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Architecture Decision Record

**ADR-030** — status: **PROPOSED** — decided: **2026-04-19**

This page renders the canonical ADR source verbatim. The authoritative
source is at [`src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-033-gcc-boundary-drift-class.md`](../../src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-033-gcc-boundary-drift-class.md).
Any change to this ADR's content happens in the source file; this
wrapper is regenerated by `scripts/generate_adr_qmd_wrappers.py` per
[ADR-072](adr-072-canon-publication-policy.qmd).
:::

{{< include ../../src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-033-gcc-boundary-drift-class.md >}}
